A leading accounts payable software for community association management
Fall risk measurement and mitigation for the active aging community
Scan Data Solution for C-Stores
Manufacturing revolutionary metal and polymer coated fibres for EMI
Carbon credit quality and impact ratings to improve carbon markets
Lidrotec aim to expand the application potential of processing with ultra-short pulse lasers.
P6 is a global company that was launched by seasoned entrepreneurs with experience in the energy and petrochemical sectors.
NanoTech is the market leading technology enabler for passive fire protection and insulation.
Emvolon converts standard diesel engines from cars and trucks into small compressors and chemical reactors by placing a catalyst in-cylinder.
Persona is creating a world where heavy-duty humanoid robots can work side-by-side with humans to tackle complex tasks across society.
Transforming the way babies are fed in the NICU and beyond
Dedicated to saving lives of people suffering from organ failure by increasing the vitality and number of donor organs
Pioneer in autonomous yard operations for logistics hubs.
A new type of photocatalytic chemical reactor to revolutionize the industrial gas, chemical, and energy industries
Chemical analysis made simple, for anyone, to use anywhere and anytime.
Helping physicians deliver the highest quality, person-centered cognitive care.
Developing next-gen sensing technology and an advanced surgical tool platform for minimally invasive procedures.
Providing a patient’s story and status changes at a glance using real-time clinical surveillance.
The most advanced operator tech platform
Prehospital stroke diagnostics.
Driving industrial efficiency through chemistry innovation.
Bioremediation technology company whose proprietary biocatalysts optimize biogas generation and biosolids reduction.
We're bringing touch and emotion to extended reality experiences — bridging the distance between you and what matters.
Maker of high quality DIY experimental kits that teach electronics, physics and engineering.
Redefining movement through 3-dimensional space with control systems that allow people to explore, create and move in ways previously impossible.
Iterion Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing novel therapeutics.
SensorRx is powering a Patient-Generated Health Data (PGHD) platform that links actionable information directly to clinicians in order to improve patient outcomes.
Battery material innovators powering the next generation of lithium-ion batteries for portable consumer electronics to electric vehicles.
World's first lightweight, ropeless suction based robot for exterior facade cleaning.

"Goose Capital has been a driving force in our company's success. Their commitment of time and resources has aided in customer acquisition, business strategy and helped drive us to over 7X growth YoY. Great investors act like extended team and are on the mission with you – Goose Capital is a shining example of how that investor/startup relationship should work!"

— Gabe Grifoni, Rufus Labs

"...GOOSE Capital was our earliest investor, and I can’t speak highly enough about them. They have provided us an infinite amount of value beyond the investment itself. Good luck - they are an amazing group to have on your side."

— Chip Breitenkamp, President, NanoGraf

"Each member of GOOSE Capital has either scaled or operated a highly successful business. This positions them to be value-added partners, mentors and door openers at every stage of a company's life-cycle. Sustained value-add is uncommon for early stage investors, and this is GOOSE Capital's unique differentiator, well beyond any investment they provide."

— Benjamin Hernandez, NuMat Technologies

"...GOOSE CAPITAL was our earliest investor, and I can’t speak highly enough about them. They have provided us an infinite amount of value beyond the investment itself. Good luck - they are an amazing group to have on your side."

— Chip Breitenkamp, President, NanoGraf

“We are proud to have found a competent and committed lead investor in Goose Capital. Throughout the entire process, from negotiation and due diligence to the closing of the round, the interaction was always fair, goal-oriented and efficient. We are looking forward to our joint successes on the way to an affordable future.”

— Robert Brull, CEO, FibreCoat GmbH
